scripts.build:arcade: npm run build --workspace @bbh/arcade-core && npm run build --workspace @bbh/arcade-server && npm run build --workspace @bbh/arcade-client
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @bbh/server" "npm run dev --workspace @bbh/client"
scripts.dev:arcade-server: npm run build:arcade-core && npm run dev --workspace @bbh/arcade-server
scripts.dev:arcade-client: npm run build:arcade-core && npm run dev --workspace @bbh/arcade-client
scripts.dev:arcade: npm run build:arcade-core && concurrently -n arcade-server,arcade-client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @bbh/arcade-server" "npm run dev --workspace @bbh/arcade-client"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @bbh/shared && npm run test --workspace @bbh/server && npm run test --workspace @bbh/client
scripts.test:arcade: npm run test --workspace @bbh/arcade-core && npm run test --workspace @bbh/arcade-server && npm run test --workspace @bbh/arcade-client
